start:
Hi!👋

I'm your math assistant!📊
Write me your problem and I'll try to solve it!
skills_answer:
That's all I know how to solve📝:

1. Examples
2. Equations with one variable
3. Inequalities

There is also an active development of many other things!🧑🏻‍💻
note_answer: Note📃: 1. The "*" sign is used for multiplication Input examples: 5x❌ 5 * x✅ 4 * 3✅ 2. To write the degree, use "**" or "^" Input examples: 2^4 (2 to the 4th power) x ** 2 (x to the 2nd degree) 3.When writing equations, use "x" Input examples: 5 * a = 10❌ 5 * x = 10✅ 4. Degrees for sin, cos, tg, ctg are written in parentheses Input examples: cos 15 ❌ sin(30)✅ sin(45) + tg(90)✅ If the bot sent an empty response, it means that the example is unsolvable
plot_message: 📝 Enter a function to plot: Supported functions: • sin(x), cos(x), tan(x), cot(x) • sqrt(x), log(x), exp(x) • abs(x), factorial(x) Examples: • x**2 • sin(x) + 3 • 2*x - 5
error:
An error has occurred:(

Error (for the developer, this won't happen in the future):
wrong_input:
Incorrect equation.

Check your entry and try again
premium_choose: Select the subscription duration👇🏻: • 1 MONTH - 250⭐ • 3 MONTHS - 650⭐ • 12 MONTHS - 2500⭐
premium_answer: Unlock the full potential of the bot!💪🏻 The premium subscription removes all restrctions and gives unlimited access to all functions This is a new level of convenience and possibilities.
premium_description_for_link: Unlock the full potential of the bot!
payments_successful_answer: Thank you for your trust! The full functionality of the bot is now available to you☺
payments_failed_answer:
Unfortunately, an error occurred while processing the payment.

If the premium has not been issued within 3hours, be sure to report your problem to support using the 'Support' button and we will solve it!
attempts_ended: The free attempts are over! Purchase a premium that gives you full access to all functions of the bot, or wait 24 hours to restore free attempts!
support_write_message: Enter your support request: ❕Use only text in your message
support_access: Your request has been accepted✅ If necessary, Ticket ID: {ticket_id}
support_answer: ✉ Support response to your request (Ticket ID = {ticket_id}):
support_error:
❌ Your application could not be saved.

Please make sure that the message contains only text (without photos, videos, stickers or files), and try to describe the ploblem again.

If the error repeats, try submitting the request later

We apologize for the inconvenience❤
support_no_tickets:
All tickets are closed!

Good job!💪🏻
support_ask_for_answer: Write a response to the ticket:
support_success_answer: The response to the request has been sent to the user!✅
support_failed_answer:
An error occurred while saving the response. Try clicking on the "Reply" button again and you will have to enter the answer again.

If an error occurs, contact the technical department.
thanks_for_rating: Thanks for sharing your experience! 🙌 We appreciate your help in making our support better
user_was_banned_successful: The user with user_id: {user_id} has been banned
user_was_banned_unsuccessful: Error when trying to ban the user(user_id = {user_id})
no_bans_to_load: These were the last banned users!
unsuccessful_unban: An error occurred while trying to unblock the user, try again later
add_admin_successful: The administrator role was successfully assigned to the user (user_id: {user_id})!
add_admin_unsuccessful: An error occurred while trying to assign the administrator role to the user! (user_id: {user_id})
remove_admin_successful: The administrator role has been successfully removed (user_id: {user_id})!
remove_admin_unsuccessful: An error occurred while trying to remove the administrator role (user_id: {user_id})
